answers: Estate planning: will, power of attorney, healthcare directive, beneficiary designations, and possibly trusts.
Everyone needs a will — it ensures your wishes are followed and reduces family conflicts after you're gone.
Tips: update after major life events (marriage, children, divorce), keep documents accessible, and consult a lawyer.
Estate planning ki: mrittur pore sampotti ki hobe tar plan. Will likho, beneficiary nominate koro.
